svg.title: Grouped bar chart: SW vs HW accelerator latency (compute-only)
svg.desc: Log-scale grouped bar chart comparing ARM Cortex-A9 NumPy/BLAS software compute time versus CIM hardware compute-core latency across MLP, small_mlp, LeNet-5 Sequential, and LeNet-5 Batched BLAS. Compute-core speedups 65.4×, 149.7×, 191.1×, 12.4× (MLP, small_mlp, LeNet-5 Sequential, LeNet-5 Batched).
svg.text: Inference Latency: Software Baseline vs. Hardware Accelerator (compute-only)
